sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Profile.css'; // Import your components import Breathing from './BreathingExercise'; import Games from './GamesModal'; import Journal from './JournalModal'; import Sleep from './SleepCompanionModal'; import Shop from './ShopModal'; import Report from './Report'; import AICoach from './AICoach'; import Meditation from './Meditation'; function Profile({ user, onUpdateUser, onShowSettings, onLogout, // Add these props to match your main page functionality onShowBreathing, onShowGames, onShowJournal, onShowSleep, onShowShop, onShowReport, onShowAICoach, onShowMeditation, // Add state management props if needed currentView, setCurrentView, isBreathingVisible, setIsBreathingVisible, // Add other state props as needed }) { const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState('overview'); const [selectedPlan, setSelectedPlan] = useState(null); // ✅ The complete 6-plan structure const plans = [ { id: 'weekly', name: 'Starter Pass', price: '₹99', period: '/week', description: 'A low-risk trial of all premium features.', features: ['Full access for 7 days', 'Mindful Games', 'AI Coach'], highlight: false }, { id: 'monthly', name: 'Monthly Plus', price: '₹299', period: '/month', description: 'Full access with monthly flexibility.', features: ['Everything in Starter', 'Cancel Anytime', 'Priority Support'], highlight: false }, { id: 'quarterly', name: 'Quarterly Pro', price: '₹749', period: '/3 months', description: 'A balanced option for committed users.', features: ['Everything in Monthly', 'Save over 15%', 'Extended feature trials'], highlight: false, savings: 'Save 16%' }, { id: 'annual', name: 'Annual Premium', price: '₹1,999', period: '/year', description: 'Our best value for dedicated users.', features: ['Everything in Quarterly', 'Exclusive Themes & Avatars', 'Early Access'], highlight: true, savings: 'Save 44%' }, { id: 'student', name: 'Student Annual', price: '₹999', period: '/year', description: 'Accessible wellness for students.', features: ['All Annual Premium features', 'Requires Student Verification'], highlight: false, savings: '50% Off' }, { id: 'lifetime', name: 'Elite Lifetime', price: '₹4,999', period: 'one-time', description: 'Pay once, own forever.', features: ['Everything in Annual', 'Exclusive Founder Badge'], highlight: false }, ]; const handleSubscribe = async (planId) => { try { console.log(`Subscribing to plan: ${planId}`); onUpdateUser({ ...user, plan: planId, is_premium: 1 }); alert(`🎉 Welcome to ${plans.find(p => p.id === planId).name}!`); } catch (error) { alert("Subscription failed. Please try again."); } }; // Enhanced handler for tool navigation const handleToolNavigation = (tool) => { setActiveSection(tool); // If you have specific handlers from main page, use them switch(tool) { case 'breathing': if (onShowBreathing) onShowBreathing(); break; case 'games': if (onShowGames) onShowGames(); break; case 'journal': if (onShowJournal) onShowJournal(); break; case 'sleep': if (onShowSleep) onShowSleep(); break; case 'shop': if (onShowShop) onShowShop(); break; case 'report': if (onShowReport) onShowReport(); break; case 'aiCoach': if (onShowAICoach) onShowAICoach(); break; case 'meditation': if (onShowMeditation) onShowMeditation(); break; default: break; } }; // Function to render tool components with proper props const renderToolComponent = (tool) => { const commonProps = { user: user, onUpdateUser: onUpdateUser, onClose: () => setActiveSection('overview') // Go back to overview when closed }; switch(tool) { case 'breathing': return ; case 'games': return ; case 'journal': return ; case 'sleep': return ; case 'shop': return ; case 'report': return ; case 'aiCoach': return ; case 'meditation': return ; default: return null; } }; return (
{/* Sidebar Navigation */}
{user.username?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U'}

{user.username}

{user.email}

🔥 {user.streak || 0} Day Streak
🪙 {user.coins || 0} Coins
{user.is_premium ? '🌟 Premium' : '💎 Basic'}
{/* Main Content Area with Scroll */}
{activeSection === 'overview' && (

💬

🎯

)} {activeSection === 'tools' && (

Wellness Tools

Access tools to support your mental wellness journey

handleToolNavigation('breathing')}>
🌬️

Breathing Exercises

Calm your mind with guided techniques

Free
handleToolNavigation('games')}>
🎮

Mindful Games

Relaxing games for stress relief

Free
handleToolNavigation('aiCoach')}>
🤖

AI Coach

Personalized wellness guidance

{user.is_premium ? 'Active' : 'Premium'}
handleToolNavigation('sleep')}>
🌙

Sleep Companion

Tools for better sleep hygiene

{user.is_premium ? 'Active' : 'Premium'}
handleToolNavigation('report')}>
📊

Mood Reports

Track emotional patterns

{user.is_premium ? 'Advanced' : 'Basic'}
handleToolNavigation('shop')}>
🛒

Shop

Purchase themes, avatars, and more

Free
handleToolNavigation('meditation')}>
🧘

Meditation

Guided meditation sessions

Free
handleToolNavigation('journal')}>
📔

Journal

Record your thoughts and feelings

Free
)} {activeSection === 'premium' && (
{user.is_premium ? (
🌟

Premium Membership Active

You're enjoying all exclusive features

✅

Unlimited AI Coach

24/7 access to personalized guidance

✅

Advanced Analytics

Detailed mood insights and patterns

✅

Premium Content

Exclusive meditation and sleep content

✅

Ad-Free Experience

No interruptions in your journey

) : (
💎

Upgrade to Premium

Unlock the full potential of your wellness journey

}

))}

📊 Advanced Analytics & Reports
🎵 Premium Meditation Content
🌙 Sleep Stories & Companion
🚫 Ad-Free Experience
💬 Priority Support
)}
)} {/* Render Tool Components */} {['breathing', 'games', 'journal', 'sleep', 'shop', 'report', 'aiCoach', 'meditation'].includes(activeSection) && renderToolComponent(activeSection) }
); } export default Profile;
